collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (2 total Queries, 2 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT b.*, COUNT(v.id) as ev_count FROM brands b LEFT JOIN vehicles v ON v.brand_id = b.id AND v.status = 'published' WHERE b.status IN ('active', 'published') GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY b.featured DESC, ev_count DESC, b.name ASC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT b.*, COUNT(v.id) as ev_count FROM brands b LEFT JOIN vehicles v ON v.brand_id = b.id AND v.status = 'published' WHERE b.status IN ('active', 'published') GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY b.featured DESC, ev_count DESC, b.name ASC
